metadata.name: GithubStarsIndex
metadata.description: 自动抓取 GitHub Stars，生成 AI 摘要，便于检索。

summary.zh: 该工具通过 GitHub Actions 自动化抓取用户 Star 列表，利用 AI 大模型生成仓库摘要与技术标签。支持标签归一化治理、增量更新及 GitHub Pages 部署，将零散 Star 转化为可检索的个人知识库，实现技术资产的自动化沉淀与高效管理。
summary.en: This tool automates GitHub Stars collection via Actions, using AI models to generate summaries and tech tags. It features tag normalization, incremental updates, and GitHub Pages deployment, transforming scattered Stars into a searchable personal knowledge base for efficient tech asset management.

metadata.name: QwenPaw
metadata.description: Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabilities.

summary.zh: QwenPaw 是由 AgentScope 打造的个人 AI 助手，支持本地与云端部署，确保数据隐私完全可控。它具备多聊天应用接入能力，支持技能扩展处理文档及新闻摘要。易于安装，旨在成为懂你且随你成长的智能伙伴，适合追求隐私和高效办公的用户。
summary.en: QwenPaw is a personal AI assistant by AgentScope, designed for privacy and flexibility. It supports local or cloud deployment, keeping your data under full control without third-party hosting. Featuring multi-channel chat integration and extensible skills like PDF processing and news digestion, it serves as a secure, customizable productivity partner for individuals seeking efficient and private AI assistance.

metadata.name: sms_forwarding
metadata.description: 超低成本硬件短信转发器，支持移动联通电信，ML307R+ESP32C3

summary.zh: 该项目是一款基于 ESP32C3 与 ML307R 的低成本短信转发硬件方案。通过 AT 指令实现 4G 短信接收，支持 Web 界面配置及邮件、钉钉、微信等 7 种推送通道。适用于个人保号、验证码接收及 IoT 远程通知场景，总硬件成本约 28 元，具备长短信合并与远程管理功能。
summary.en: This project is a low-cost SMS forwarding hardware solution based on ESP32C3 and ML307R. It receives 4G SMS via AT commands and supports 7 push channels including email, DingTalk, and WeChat. Ideal for number retention, verification codes, and IoT notifications, with a total hardware cost of ~$4. It features long SMS merging and remote management via a web interface.

metadata.name: GithubStarsManager
metadata.description: An app for managing github starred repositories.

summary.zh: GithubStarsManager 是一款跨平台桌面应用，旨在解决 GitHub 用户“Star 了找不到”的痛点。它通过 AI 自动对 Star 仓库进行总结、打标签和分类，支持语义搜索、Release 追踪及一键下载。数据 100% 本地存储，保障隐私，是开发者高效管理知识资产的理想工具。
summary.en: GithubStarsManager is a cross-platform desktop app designed to solve the "starred but lost" problem. It leverages AI to auto-summarize, tag, and categorize starred repositories, enabling semantic search, release tracking, and one-click downloads. With 100% local data storage, it ensures privacy while serving as an efficient tool for developers to manage their knowledge assets.

summary.zh: 3x-ui 是 Xray-core 的 Web 管理面板，本分支增强了一键协议模板、多服务器批量下发及中转分流功能。支持 VLESS/Trojan 等主流协议，内置扫码导入与共享订阅，大幅降低 VPS 代理节点部署门槛，适合个人网络通信与运维管理。
summary.en: 3x-ui is a web-based Xray-core panel enhanced with one-click protocol templates, multi-server deployment, and relay features. It supports VLESS/Trojan protocols, QR code imports, and shared subscriptions, significantly simplifying VPS proxy node management for personal network communication and operations.

metadata.description: nine one

summary.zh: 个人私有视频站，支持115云盘、PikPak、OneDrive等多云盘后端，302模式实现低带宽播放。自动生视频封面与预览片段，支持自定义爬虫脚本和短视频模式。提供一键脚本和Docker部署，数据本地存储，适合个人媒体库管理。
summary.en: Personal private video station supporting multiple cloud storage backends including 115, PikPak, OneDrive with 302 redirect mode for low-bandwidth playback. Auto-generates video thumbnails and previews, supports custom spider scripts and short video mode. Offers one-click script and Docker deployment with local data storage for personal media library management.

metadata.name: vpn-configs-for-russia
metadata.description: 🗽Бесплатные и проверенные VPN конфигурации, работающие в РФ ⚪ Белые списки / обход белых списков ⚪ Free and checked VPN configurations that work in Russia ⚪ Whitelists bypass

summary.zh: 专为俄罗斯用户打造的免费 VPN 配置集合，支持 VLESS、Trojan 等多协议。项目具备每两小时自动测试与更新机制，通过脚本过滤无效节点，确保高可用性与速度。旨在帮助用户绕过网络封锁，保持稳定在线连接。
summary.en: This repository provides a curated collection of free, verified VPN configurations specifically optimized for users within Russia. Supporting modern protocols like VLESS, Trojan, and Shadowsocks, it features an automated 2-hour testing cycle to filter out slow or blocked nodes. This robust tool ensures high availability and helps users effectively bypass censorship to maintain stable internet connectivity. It also offers mirror links to ensure access continuity.

metadata.name: streambert
metadata.description: A cross-platform Electron Desktop App to stream and download any Movie, TV Series or Anime in the World. Zero Ads and Tracking

summary.zh: Streambert 是一款基于 Electron 的跨平台桌面应用，支持全球电影、剧集和动漫的流媒体播放与下载。它集成 TMDB 和 AniList 数据源，主打无广告、无追踪的隐私保护体验。具备多源流媒体抓取、m3u8 多线程下载及字幕管理功能，为用户提供安全、高效的本地观影解决方案。
summary.en: Streambert is a cross-platform Electron desktop app for streaming and downloading global movies, series, and anime. It integrates TMDB and AniList APIs, focusing on privacy with zero ads or tracking. Features include multi-source streaming, m3u8 multithreaded downloading, and subtitle management, offering a secure and efficient local viewing experience.

summary.zh: X-Spider 二黑修改版是一款专为推特设计的媒体下载工具，支持批量获取博主图片与视频。具备日期过滤、自动去重及代理配置功能。项目现由 AI 辅助开发，致力于提供高效、稳定的数据采集体验，满足用户个性化下载需求。
summary.en: X-Spider Mod is a specialized Twitter media downloader supporting batch image and video retrieval. It features date filtering, deduplication, and proxy configuration. Currently AI-assisted for continuous updates, it ensures efficient and stable data collection for personalized user needs.

metadata.name: Selene-TV
metadata.description: 以 MoonTV v100 版本 / Helios 为后端的 Android TV 客户端，针对遥控器设备优化

summary.zh: Selene-TV 是一款专为 Android TV 打造的沉浸式视频客户端，基于 Kotlin 与 Jetpack Compose 构建。它支持多源聚合搜索、跨平台弹幕渲染及手机扫码遥控，采用 ExoPlayer/mpv 双内核，完美适配遥控器操作，提供影院级观影体验。
summary.en: Selene-TV is an immersive Android TV client built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. It features multi-source aggregation, cross-platform danmaku, and mobile QR-code remote control. Powered by dual ExoPlayer/mpv kernels, it offers a cinematic experience optimized for D-pad navigation.

metadata.name: XHTTP-Installer
metadata.description: VLESS+XHTTP+TLS Auto-Installer for Ubuntu — Vercel / Netlify relay

summary.zh: 该工具是一款针对 Ubuntu 的 VLESS+XHTTP+TLS 自动化部署脚本。核心亮点在于利用 Vercel/Netlify 边缘计算作为 CDN 中继，有效隐藏真实服务器 IP 以防封锁。支持一键安装、自动 SSL 配置，实现高隐蔽性与高速度的网络代理架构，简化运维流程。
summary.en: This project is an automated installer for VLESS+XHTTP+TLS proxies on Ubuntu. Its core feature leverages Vercel/Netlify edge computing as a CDN relay to mask the real server IP against blocking. Supporting one-click deployment, automatic SSL provisioning, and E2E testing, it delivers a high-privacy, high-speed proxy architecture that significantly simplifies the maintenance workflow.

metadata.name: lxserver
metadata.description: LX Music 数据同步服务端，同时支持了部分lx-music-desktop的网页端实现。

summary.zh: 这是一个 LX Music 的增强版数据同步服务端，内置了功能强大的 Web 播放器。支持多源搜索、多平台歌单管理、Subsonic 协议适配以及歌词卡片分享。提供现代化 UI 和深色模式，支持自定义源和缓存管理，适合个人搭建私有音乐库，实现跨设备无缝同步与播放体验。
summary.en: An enhanced LX Music sync server featuring a powerful built-in Web player. It supports multi-source search, cross-platform playlist management, Subsonic protocol integration, and lyric card sharing. With modern UI, dark mode, custom sources, and cache management, it's ideal for personal private music libraries, enabling seamless cross-device synchronization and playback experiences.

summary.zh: 基于 Cloudflare Worker 的视频订阅服务部署方案，支持 TXT/M3U 格式，提供聚合搜索与多频道访问功能。支持 Docker 容器化部署，兼容 OK 影视、DIYP 等客户端，解决非大陆服务器部署难题，适合个人学习研究使用。
summary.en: Cloudflare Worker-based video subscription deployment solution supporting TXT/M3U formats with aggregated search and multi-channel access. Docker containerization available, compatible with OK 影视/DIYP clients, solves non-mainland server deployment challenges for personal learning and research.

summary.zh: 本项目致敬张雪峰，旨在消除高考志愿填报信息差。它提供了一套开源的决策框架与知识库，不仅包含院校专业选择逻辑，更引入AI时代行业前景校正。支持一键部署为OpenClaw Skills、Claude Code插件或导入RAG平台，让普通家庭通过微信等渠道低成本获取专业AI顾问服务。
summary.en: This open-source project honors Zhang Xuefeng by bridging the information gap in college admissions. It offers a decision-making framework and knowledge base, featuring AI-era industry corrections. It supports deployment as OpenClaw Skills, Claude Code plugins, or RAG imports, enabling affordable AI advisory services via WeChat for ordinary families.

metadata.name: zhangxuefeng-skill
metadata.description: 张雪峰.skill — 张雪峰的认知操作系统。高考志愿/考研/职业规划的实战思维框架。由女娲.skill生成。

summary.zh: 张雪峰.skill 是一个可运行的认知操作系统，将高考志愿、考研及职业规划转化为可执行的思维框架。基于深度调研提炼核心心智模型与决策启发式，支持多 AI 运行时环境，为用户提供务实、结构化的生涯决策辅助。
summary.en: Zhang Xuefeng.skill is a runnable cognitive operating system transforming career and education planning into executable frameworks. Built on deep research, it offers core mental models and heuristics for practical decision-making, compatible with multiple AI runtimes.

metadata.name: Telegram_MistRelay
metadata.description: 自动化下载上传

summary.zh: MistRelay 是一款基于 Telegram 机器人的 aria2 下载控制系统，支持 OneDrive 自动上传与文件直链生成。核心亮点包括数据完整性校验、智能文件过滤及 Docker 一键部署。同时提供基于 Tauri 的桌面客户端，实现本地下载与视频预览，是个人云存储管理的自动化利器。
summary.en: MistRelay is an aria2 download control system powered by a Telegram bot, featuring automatic OneDrive uploads and direct link generation. Key highlights include data integrity verification, smart file filtering, and Docker one-click deployment. It also offers a Tauri-based desktop client for local downloads and video preview, serving as an automation tool for personal cloud storage management.

metadata.name: K-Vault
metadata.description: 基于 Cloudflare 的 Serverless 聚合云盘。以 Telegram 为核心（支持 Webhook 直传与 2GB 扩展），并全面兼容 R2、S3、Discord 及 HuggingFace 等多存储后端。零成本构建你的全能私有数据金库。

summary.zh: K-Vault 是一款基于 Cloudflare Serverless 架构的聚合云盘解决方案，支持 Telegram、R2、S3 等多后端存储。提供 Docker 与 Pages 双模部署，具备无限存储、API 上传、在线预览及访客管理功能，助力用户零成本构建全能私有数据金库。
summary.en: K-Vault is a serverless cloud storage aggregator built on Cloudflare, supporting Telegram, R2, S3, and more. It offers dual deployment via Docker and Pages, featuring unlimited storage, API uploads, online previews, and guest management for zero-cost private data vaults.

metadata.name: Agent-Reach
metadata.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

summary.zh: Agent Reach 是一款专为 AI Agent 打造的互联网访问工具，支持 Twitter、YouTube、小红书等主流平台。它通过 CLI 实现零 API 费用接入，具备自动路由切换与本地 Cookie 管理功能，确保隐私安全且兼容各类 Agent 框架，让 AI 轻松获取全网信息。
summary.en: Agent Reach empowers AI Agents with seamless internet access across platforms like Twitter, YouTube, and XiaoHongShu. It offers zero-API-cost CLI integration, automatic backend routing, and local Cookie management for privacy. Compatible with major Agent frameworks, it enables AI to effortlessly retrieve and analyze global web data.

metadata.name: nodewarden
metadata.description: Bitwarden-compatible server running on Cloudflare Workers

summary.zh: NodeWarden 是运行于 Cloudflare Workers 的轻量级 Bitwarden 兼容服务端。支持 PWA 离线访问、Passkey 无密码登录及 WebDAV/S3 云端备份。完美兼容官方客户端，部署极简，是构建私有化、高可用密码管理方案的理想选择。
summary.en: NodeWarden is a lightweight, Bitwarden-compatible serverless solution hosted on Cloudflare Workers. It enables PWA offline access, Passkey authentication, and automated cloud backups via WebDAV/S3. Fully compatible with official clients, it offers an easy-to-deploy, private password management infrastructure.

metadata.name: warden-worker
metadata.description: A Bitwarden-compatible server for Cloudflare Workers

summary.zh: Warden 是一款基于 Cloudflare Workers 的无服务器 Bitwarden 兼容密码管理后端。它利用 D1 数据库与 R2/KV 存储，实现零成本、免运维的自托管方案。支持核心密码管理、TOTP 及实时同步，完美兼容官方客户端，是个人用户构建安全、低成本密码库的理想选择。
summary.en: Warden is a serverless Bitwarden-compatible password manager backend deployed on Cloudflare Workers. Leveraging D1 and R2/KV storage, it offers a free, zero-maintenance self-hosted solution. Supporting core vault features, TOTP, and real-time sync, it fully integrates with official clients, ideal for personal secure password management.

metadata.name: kgcheckin
metadata.description: 酷狗概念VIP自动签到

summary.zh: 本项目基于 GitHub Actions 实现酷狗概念 VIP 的自动化签到，支持二维码与手机号登录。通过定时任务每日自动领取 VIP 权益，提供完善的 Secret 配置指南与多账号管理方案，是典型的云端自动化运维与 API 调用实践工具。
summary.en: This project automates KuGou Concept VIP check-ins using GitHub Actions, supporting QR code and phone login. It features scheduled tasks for daily VIP benefits, comprehensive Secret configuration, and multi-account management, serving as a practical tool for cloud automation and API integration.

metadata.name: iptv-m3u-manager
metadata.description: IPTV M3U 管理器

summary.zh: 这是一个强大的 IPTV M3U 订阅管理工具，支持多源聚合、正则筛选与自定义分组。特色在于集成 AI 视觉检测与 FFmpeg 截图，自动验证频道有效性并智能去重。提供 EPG 节目表补全与 Docker 一键部署，是构建高质量直播源的理想方案。
summary.en: A powerful IPTV M3U subscription manager featuring multi-source aggregation, regex filtering, and custom grouping. It integrates AI visual detection and FFmpeg for automatic channel validation and intelligent deduplication. Includes EPG completion and Docker deployment, ideal for building high-quality live streams.

summary.zh: 本插件是专为 OpenWRT 路由器设计的 LUCI 通知推送工具，支持钉钉、企业微信、飞书及 PushPlus 等多平台 API。核心功能涵盖设备在线/离线检测、IP 变动提醒、流量统计及 CPU 温度监控，实现网络状态的实时消息推送与自动化运维管理。
summary.en: A LUCI plugin for OpenWRT routers enabling multi-platform push notifications via DingTalk, WeChat Work, Feishu, and PushPlus. It features real-time monitoring of device status, IP changes, traffic usage, and system metrics, facilitating automated network management and alerting.

summary.zh: MageKit 是一款基于 Rust 和 GPUI 框架构建的现代化高性能桌面视频下载工具。它利用 yt-dlp 作为核心引擎，支持 YouTube、Bilibili 等主流平台，具备 GPU 加速界面、多任务并发下载及完善的任务管理功能，提供跨平台流畅体验。
summary.en: MageKit is a modern, high-performance desktop video downloader built with Rust and the GPUI framework. Leveraging yt-dlp as its core engine, it supports major platforms like YouTube and Bilibili, featuring GPU-accelerated UI, concurrent downloads, and robust task management for a seamless cross-platform experience.

summary.zh: 基于 Air780E 和 LuatOS 开发的智能短信转发系统。支持关键词与正则匹配，可将短信实时转发至企业微信、飞书、钉钉及邮件等渠道。具备异步并发、低功耗及网络容错机制，适用于物联网设备监控与远程告警场景。
summary.en: An intelligent SMS forwarding system built on Air780E and LuatOS. It supports keyword and regex matching to forward messages to WeCom, Feishu, DingTalk, and email. Features include asynchronous processing, low power consumption, and network fault tolerance, ideal for IoT monitoring and remote alerts.

metadata.name: movecar
metadata.description: 🚗 智能挪车通知系统 - 基于 Cloudflare Workers，支持实时位置共享和多推送服务

summary.zh: 基于 Cloudflare Workers 构建的智能挪车系统，通过扫码通知保护双方隐私，不暴露电话号码。支持实时位置共享与防骚扰机制，采用 Serverless 架构实现零运维部署。适用于个人车主及社区场景，高效解决停车联系难题。
summary.en: MoveCar is a privacy-focused system built on Cloudflare Workers for car relocation. It enables QR code scanning to notify owners without exposing phone numbers. Features include real-time location sharing, anti-harassment delays, and serverless deployment. Ideal for protecting privacy and solving parking issues efficiently.

metadata.name: dysync.net
metadata.description: 视频同步工具

summary.zh: 这是一款基于.NET Core和Vue开发的抖音视频同步工具，支持自动同步收藏夹、喜欢列表及指定博主作品。内置视频信息刮削功能，完美适配NAS环境，通过Docker部署后可将视频直接对接Emby或Jellyfin媒体库，实现个人影音资源的自动化管理与播放。
summary.en: A Douyin video sync tool built with .NET Core and Vue, automating the synchronization of favorites, liked videos, and specific creator content. Featuring metadata scraping, it is optimized for NAS environments via Docker deployment, seamlessly integrating with Emby or Jellyfin for automated personal media library management and playback.

metadata.name: renewhelper
metadata.description: RenewHelper - 时序·守望是一款基于Cloudflare Workers的全栈服务生命周期提醒、管理工具。它专为管理周期性订阅、域名续费、服务器到期等场景设计。无需服务器，零成本托管，提供精美的机甲风（Mecha-style）UI 界面、强大的农历/公历计算核心、多渠道通知推送能力、iCal日程同步以及账单管理功能。同时支持Worker和Docker方式部署。

summary.zh: RenewHelper是基于Cloudflare Workers的零成本服务生命周期管理工具，支持订阅/域名/服务器到期提醒。具备农历公历双历计算、多渠道通知推送、iCal日程同步及账单看板功能，采用Vue3+Element Plus构建机甲风UI，支持Worker/Docker双部署模式。
summary.en: RenewHelper is a serverless service lifecycle manager built on Cloudflare Workers, offering subscription/domain/server renewal alerts. Features include lunar/solar calendar calculations, multi-channel notifications, iCal sync, and financial dashboards. Built with Vue3+Element Plus, supports Worker/Docker deployment.

metadata.name: uart_sms_forwarder
metadata.description: Air780 短信UART转发器

summary.zh: 本项目基于合宙 Air780 系列设备，实现短信 UART 转发功能。支持短信收发、记录管理及来电通知，集成钉钉、飞书、企业微信等主流平台 Webhook。提供 Docker 及原生 Linux 部署方案，通过 Web 界面管理，适用于物联网网关及自动化运维场景。
summary.en: This project implements an SMS forwarding system based on the Air780 series devices. It supports SMS sending/receiving, logging, and incoming call notifications, with integrations for DingTalk, Feishu, and Webhooks. It offers Docker and native Linux deployment options with a Web UI, suitable for IoT gateways and automation scenarios.

metadata.name: api
metadata.description: MoonTV/LunaTV源配置，每日自动检测API状态，可在CF部署CORSAPI中转被墙API，本人提供的CORSAPI仅为测试使用，请勿滥用！

summary.zh: 本项目提供 MoonTV/LunaTV 视频聚合源配置，核心亮点是基于 Cloudflare Workers 构建 CORSAPI 中转服务，支持 API 代理、JSON 前缀替换及 Base58 编码。具备每日自动检测 API 状态与可用性监控功能，有效解决被墙资源访问问题，实现流媒体资源的自动化管理与中转。
summary.en: This project provides MoonTV/LunaTV video aggregation sources, featuring a CORSAPI proxy service built on Cloudflare Workers. It supports API proxying, JSON prefix replacement, and Base58 encoding. With daily automated API health checks, it effectively resolves access issues for blocked resources, enabling automated management and proxying of streaming media.

metadata.name: trackerslist
metadata.description: Updated list of public BitTorrent trackers

summary.zh: 该仓库提供自动更新的公共 BitTorrent 追踪器列表，涵盖 UDP、HTTP、HTTPS 等多种协议及 IP 直连格式。通过自动化脚本每日校验有效性，解决 DNS 解析问题，是提升 P2P 下载速度与稳定性的核心资源库。
summary.en: This repository provides automatically updated lists of public BitTorrent trackers, covering protocols like UDP, HTTP, HTTPS, and IP direct connections. It uses automated scripts for daily validation to solve DNS issues, serving as a core resource for enhancing P2P download speed and stability.

metadata.name: argosbx
metadata.description: 小白自建代理神器！ArgoSBX一键无交互小钢炮脚本💣：Sing-box、Xray、Argo三内核自动搭配；支持VPS、Docker、容器多环境部署；套CDN的5大方案+套WARP的15种组合；已支持协议：AnyTLS、Any-reality、Vless-xhttp-reality-vision-enc、Vless-tcp-reality-vision、Vless-xhttp-vision-enc、Vless-ws-vision-enc、Shadowsocks-2022、Hysteria2、Tuic、Socks5、Vmess-ws、Argo临时/固定隧道

summary.zh: Argosbx 是一款专为小白设计的自建代理神器，支持 Sing-box、Xray 和 Argo 三内核自动搭配。支持多环境一键无交互部署，涵盖 AnyTLS、Reality、Hysteria2 等十余种协议。内置 15 种 WARP 出站组合解锁流媒体，实现网络加速与隐私保护。
summary.en: Argosbx is a beginner-friendly self-hosted proxy tool featuring automatic integration of Sing-box, Xray, and Argo kernels. It supports one-click, non-interactive deployment on VPS and Docker environments with over ten protocols like AnyTLS, Reality, and Hysteria2. Built-in WARP egress combinations unlock streaming media, ensuring minimalist, lightweight, and rapid network acceleration and privacy protection.

metadata.name: go-wxpush
metadata.description: 极简且免费的微信消息推送服务 (基于golang)

summary.zh: go-wxpush 是一款基于 Golang 开发的极简微信推送服务，利用微信测试公众号模板消息实现 HTTP API 推送。支持 Docker 一键部署（镜像仅 2MB），提供每日 10 万次免费额度，具备原生弹窗提醒，适合个人开发者及运维场景。
summary.en: go-wxpush is a lightweight, free WeChat push notification service built with Golang. It leverages WeChat test account templates to deliver messages via simple HTTP APIs. Features include Docker deployment (2MB image), 100k daily free quotas, and native pop-up alerts, ideal for developers and DevOps monitoring.

metadata.name: whistle
metadata.description: HTTP, HTTP2, HTTPS, Websocket debugging proxy

summary.zh: Whistle 是基于 Node.js 的跨平台网络抓包与调试工具，支持 HTTP、HTTPS、WebSocket 等协议。它提供强大的规则修改、代理管理及内置调试工具（如 Weinre），适用于前端/后端开发调试，具备插件扩展能力与命令行操作便捷性。
summary.en: Whistle is a cross-platform network debugging proxy built on Node.js, supporting HTTP, HTTPS, WebSocket, and TCP. It offers rule-based request/response modification, integrated tools like Weinre, and plugin extensibility, ideal for web development debugging and traffic analysis.

summary.zh: CFnew 是基于 Cloudflare Workers 的代理节点管理工具，支持 VLESS、Trojan 等多协议及内置订阅转换。通过 KV 存储实现图形化实时配置，兼容 Clash、Sing-box 等主流客户端，提供延迟测试、地区筛选及 ECH 加密功能，适合快速搭建代理节点。
summary.en: CFnew is a proxy node management tool based on Cloudflare Workers, supporting VLESS, Trojan, and built-in subscription conversion. It uses KV storage for real-time graphical configuration, compatible with Clash, Sing-box, and other clients. Features include latency testing, region filtering, and ECH encryption, ideal for quickly deploying efficient proxy nodes.

metadata.name: bilibili-video-downloader
metadata.description: 哔哩哔哩 bilibili B站 视频 下载器，图形界面 + nfo刮削 + 广告标记 + 字幕下载 + 弹幕下载，轻松将视频加入emby等媒体库

summary.zh: 基于 Tauri v2 构建的跨平台 B 站视频下载工具，支持高清画质、弹幕字幕及 NFO 元数据生成，完美适配 Emby 媒体库，提供图形化界面与批量任务管理，兼顾下载速度与媒体管理需求。
summary.en: A cross-platform Bilibili video downloader built on Tauri v2, supporting HD downloads, danmaku/subtitle extraction, and NFO metadata for Emby compatibility. Features a GUI, batch management, and high-speed segmented downloading for comprehensive media library integration.

metadata.name: TVAPP
metadata.description: 收集全网 Android TV电视盒子应用，涵盖影视、直播、K歌、工具、游戏等类型，整理优质APK资源，支持便捷下载与自动更新。提供安全验证、分类索引与兼容性标注，助力用户打造家庭影音娱乐中心！              ✅ TVBox/影视仓等影音壳接口配置源。

summary.zh: 本项目是一个专注于 Android TV 电视盒子的应用聚合仓库，汇集了影视、直播、K歌及工具类优质 APK 资源。提供便捷的下载、自动更新及兼容性标注，支持 TVBox 等主流壳的接口配置，旨在帮助用户快速搭建安全、丰富的家庭影音娱乐中心。
summary.en: This repository aggregates high-quality Android TV applications, covering movies, live streaming, karaoke, and utilities. It offers convenient APK downloads, auto-updates, and compatibility annotations, supporting interface configurations for shells like TVBox to help users build a secure and rich home entertainment center.

metadata.name: go-rename
metadata.description: go-rename 照片视频重命名工具 支持Windows/MacOS/Linux等各平台

summary.zh: go-rename 是一款基于 Golang 开发的跨平台照片与视频重命名工具，支持 Windows、MacOS 及 Linux。它通过读取 EXIF 拍摄时间、文件创建/修改时间或 MD5 哈希值，实现自动化批量重命名与去重，有效解决多设备拍摄导致的文件命名混乱与冲突问题，是多媒体资产整理的效率利器。
summary.en: go-rename is a cross-platform photo and video renaming tool built with Golang, supporting Windows, MacOS, and Linux. It automates batch renaming and deduplication by leveraging EXIF timestamps, file metadata, or MD5 hashes, effectively resolving naming conflicts from multi-device captures. It is an essential utility for efficient media asset management.

metadata.name: BiliTools
metadata.description: A cross-platform bilibili toolbox. 跨平台哔哩哔哩工具箱，支持下载视频、番剧等等各类资源

summary.zh: BiliTools 是一款基于 Tauri 构建的跨平台哔哩哔哩工具箱，支持视频、音频、弹幕及封面等资源的下载与解析。它兼容大会员内容，提供 4K/8K 画质及杜比视界支持，并具备账号登录、NFO 刮削及 AI 总结功能，是高效管理 B 站资源的轻量级桌面应用。
summary.en: BiliTools is a cross-platform Bilibili toolbox built on Tauri, supporting the download and parsing of videos, audio, danmaku, and covers. It handles VIP content with 4K/8K and Dolby Vision support, featuring account login, NFO scraping, and AI summaries, serving as a lightweight desktop app for efficient Bilibili resource management.

metadata.name: free-nodes
metadata.description: 🚀 免费代理节点大全 | V2Ray SS Trojan Clash 订阅链接 | 科学上网工具 | 翻墙软件 | 免费VPN | 代理服务器 | 免费梯子 | 机场节点 | Free Proxy Nodes | Shadowsocks | Vmess | Vless | 每日更新 | 高速稳定

summary.zh: 本项目聚合 V2Ray、Shadowsocks 及 Clash 等多种协议的免费代理节点，利用 GitHub Actions 实现每 6 小时自动化更新。提供标准化订阅链接与实时统计 API，支持多平台客户端一键导入，旨在为用户提供高速、稳定的网络代理解决方案，适用于跨平台网络访问场景。
summary.en: This repository aggregates free proxy nodes supporting V2Ray, Shadowsocks, and Clash protocols. Leveraging GitHub Actions, it ensures automatic updates every 6 hours. It provides standardized subscription links and a real-time statistics API, enabling one-click import for multi-platform clients to deliver high-speed, stable network proxy solutions.

metadata.name: GitHubDaily
metadata.description: 坚持分享 GitHub 上高质量、有趣实用的开源技术教程、开发者工具、编程网站、技术资讯。A list cool, interesting projects of GitHub.

summary.zh: GitHubDaily 是一个坚持分享高质量开源项目的技术资讯平台，涵盖开发者工具、编程网站及技术教程。通过多平台分发与社区推荐，帮助开发者发现前沿项目、掌握技术动态并提升编程能力，目前已积累超万个精选资源。
summary.en: GitHubDaily is a tech news platform dedicated to sharing high-quality open-source projects, including developer tools, programming websites, and tutorials. It helps developers discover cutting-edge projects, stay updated on tech trends, and improve coding skills through multi-platform distribution and community recommendations.

metadata.name: free-proxy-list
metadata.description: 🚀 Free HTTP, SOCKS4, & SOCKS5 Proxy List * Updated every 5 minutes *

summary.zh: Proxifly 提供全球 107 个国家的免费 HTTP、SOCKS4/5 代理列表，每 5 分钟自动更新验证。支持 JSON、TXT、CSV 多种格式，可通过网站、NPM 模块或桌面软件获取。适用于爬虫、隐私保护及网络测试场景，确保连接稳定且无重复。
summary.en: Proxifly offers a free, globally sourced proxy list covering 107 countries with HTTP, HTTPS, SOCKS4, and SOCKS5 protocols. Updated every 5 minutes, it provides JSON, TXT, and CSV formats via website, NPM, or desktop apps. Ideal for web scraping, privacy, and network testing with verified, non-duplicate connections.

metadata.name: chinese-independent-developer
metadata.description: 👩🏿‍💻👨🏾‍💻👩🏼‍💻👨🏽‍💻👩🏻‍💻中国独立开发者项目列表 -- 分享大家都在做什么

summary.zh: 本项目聚合中国独立开发者作品，涵盖 AI 工具、SaaS 应用及实用小程序。旨在打破信息孤岛，促进开发者交流与灵感碰撞。收录项目均为可直接使用的产品，拒绝纯工具类，强调商业价值与用户体验，是发现本土创新项目的优质窗口。
summary.en: This repository aggregates projects from Chinese independent developers, spanning AI tools, SaaS platforms, and practical utilities. It aims to bridge information gaps, fostering exchange and inspiration. Featuring ready-to-use products with a focus on commercial viability and user experience, it serves as a premier window for discovering local innovation.

metadata.name: ai-goofish-monitor
metadata.description: 基于 Playwright 和AI实现的闲鱼多任务实时/定时监控与智能分析系统，配备了功能完善的后台管理UI。帮助用户从闲鱼海量商品中，找到心仪产品。

summary.zh: 基于 Playwright 与多模态 AI 的闲鱼智能监控系统，支持多任务并发与 Web 可视化后台。通过自然语言创建任务，深度分析商品详情，具备账号代理轮换及多渠道通知功能，帮助用户高效筛选心仪商品，实现电商数据自动化采集与决策。
summary.en: An intelligent Xianyu monitoring system built on Playwright and multimodal AI, featuring multi-task concurrency and a Web management UI. It enables natural language task creation, deep product analysis, account/proxy rotation, and multi-channel notifications for efficient e-commerce data collection and decision-making.

metadata.name: pansou
metadata.description: PanSou是一款高性能的网盘资源搜索API服务，支持TG频道和插件搜索。系统设计以性能和可扩展性为核心，支持多频道多插件并发搜索、结果智能排序和网盘类型分类。docker集成前后端，一键启动，开箱即用。仅供学习研究，请勿以各种形式用于盈利目的。

summary.zh: PanSou是一款高性能网盘资源搜索API服务，支持TG频道与自定义插件并发搜索。系统具备异步插件架构、多级缓存及智能排序算法，支持百度网盘等主流网盘类型。通过Docker一键部署，提供前后端集成与纯API两种模式，适合开发者构建资源聚合平台。
summary.en: PanSou is a high-performance API for cloud storage resource search, supporting concurrent TG channel and custom plugin searches. Featuring async architecture, multi-level caching, and smart sorting, it covers major platforms like Baidu Netdisk. Docker-ready for quick deployment, ideal for developers building resource aggregation platforms.

metadata.name: OpenList
metadata.description: A new AList Fork to Anti Trust Crisis

summary.zh: OpenList 是 AList 的社区驱动分支，旨在应对开源信任危机。它提供多存储挂载功能，支持阿里云盘、OneDrive、Google Drive 等主流云盘及 WebDAV 协议。项目坚持 AGPL-3.0 开源协议，强调代码透明与社区治理，为用户提供安全、去中心化的云存储聚合管理方案。
summary.en: OpenList is a community-driven fork of AList, designed to counter trust crises in open source. It supports mounting multiple storage providers like Aliyun Drive, OneDrive, and Google Drive, alongside WebDAV protocols. Committed to AGPL-3.0, it emphasizes code transparency and community governance, offering a secure, decentralized cloud storage aggregation solution.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供基于Docker的物联网设备管理解决方案，支持斐讯R1音箱等硬件的快速部署与运维。通过容器化技术实现跨平台兼容，简化Java应用的环境配置，适用于智能家居设备的自动化管理和扩展开发。
summary.en: This repository offers a Docker-based IoT device management solution for quick deployment and maintenance of hardware like the Phicomm R1 speaker. Leveraging containerization for cross-platform compatibility, it simplifies Java application setup, ideal for smart home device automation and scalable development.

metadata.name: ChinaTextbook
metadata.description: 所有小初高、大学PDF教材。

summary.zh: 本项目致力于开源中国小初高及大学 PDF 教材，旨在打破信息壁垒，促进义务教育普及与教育公平。特别服务于海外华人子女，帮助其衔接国内教育体系。通过 GitHub 托管，提供结构化、无水印的免费学习资源，倡导纯粹求知精神。
summary.en: This project open-sources Chinese K-12 and university PDF textbooks to bridge information gaps and promote educational equity. It specifically serves overseas Chinese families, helping children connect with domestic curricula. Hosted on GitHub, it provides structured, watermark-free resources, advocating for pure learning beyond exams.

metadata.name: yt-dlp
metadata.description: A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader

summary.zh: yt-dlp 是一款功能强大的命令行音视频下载工具，支持数千个视频网站。作为 youtube-dl 的活跃分支，它修复了诸多限制并增强了性能。具备插件系统、格式过滤及元数据编辑能力，是开发者与极客实现视频批量下载与自动化处理的理想选择。
summary.en: yt-dlp is a robust command-line audio/video downloader supporting thousands of sites. As an actively maintained fork of youtube-dl, it offers enhanced performance and features like plugin support, format filtering, and metadata editing. It serves as the industry standard for developers and power users seeking reliable, automated video downloading and processing solutions.

metadata.name: SaveAny-Bot
metadata.description: Save Any Telegram File to Anywhere 📂 (Alist, Disk, Webdav, S3, Rclone...) . Support restrict saving content and files beyond telegram.

summary.zh: SaveAny-Bot 是一款强大的 Telegram 文件管理工具，支持将各类媒体无缝同步至本地、Alist、S3 及 WebDAV 等多种存储后端。它不仅能绕过保存限制，还集成 yt-dlp 和 Aria2，支持批量下载、流式传输及 JS 插件扩展，是高效的数据归档与跨平台资源管理利器。
summary.en: SaveAny-Bot syncs Telegram files to Alist, S3, WebDAV, and more. It bypasses restrictions, supports batch downloads, streaming, and integrates yt-dlp/Aria2. It's an efficient tool for automated data archiving and cross-platform resource management.

metadata.name: Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
metadata.description: Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

summary.zh: Bulk Crap Uninstaller 是一款强大的免费开源卸载工具，专为 Windows 系统设计。它能快速批量移除大量应用程序，并深度清理残留文件和注册表项。支持 Windows Store、Steam 及多种安装框架，适合 IT 管理员和普通用户进行系统深度维护，显著提升电脑运行效率。
summary.en: Bulk Crap Uninstaller is a powerful free open-source tool designed for Windows to efficiently remove large volumes of unwanted applications. It excels at cleaning leftovers, detecting orphaned entries, and supporting diverse frameworks like Steam and MSIs. Ideal for IT professionals and users seeking automated system maintenance.

metadata.name: Deadpool
metadata.description: deadpool代理池工具，可从hunter、quake、fofa等网络空间测绘平台取高质量socks5代理，或本地导入socks5代理，轮询使用代理进行流量转发。

summary.zh: Deadpool是一款Go语言开发的代理池管理工具，可从Hunter、Quake、FOFA等网络空间测绘平台自动获取高质量SOCKS5代理，支持本地导入、健康检查、存活检测及轮询转发。适用于渗透测试、攻防演练中的IP轮换与流量代理，集成Burp、Proxifier等工具，具备周期性任务调度与代理统计功能。
summary.en: Deadpool is a Go-based proxy pool tool that automatically fetches high-quality SOCKS5 proxies from Hunter, Quake, and FOFA network space mapping platforms. It supports local import, health checks, liveness detection, and round-robin forwarding. Ideal for penetration testing and security drills, it integrates with Burp and Proxifier, featuring scheduled tasks and proxy statistics.

metadata.name: PROXY-List
metadata.description: Get PROXY List  that gets updated everyday

summary.zh: 该仓库提供每日自动更新的免费公共代理列表，支持 HTTP、SOCKS4 及 SOCKS5 多种协议。通过聚合全网公开节点，为用户提供便捷的网络访问与隐私保护方案，是网络爬虫、数据采集及测试环境搭建的必备资源库。
summary.en: This repository offers a daily updated list of free public proxies supporting HTTP, SOCKS4, and SOCKS5 protocols. It aggregates public nodes from the internet, serving as a vital resource for web scraping, data collection, and privacy protection in testing environments.

metadata.name: DailyHotApi
metadata.description: 🔥 今日热榜 API，一个聚合热门数据的 API 接口，支持 RSS 模式 及 Vercel 部署 | 前端页面：https://github.com/imsyy/DailyHot

summary.zh: DailyHotApi 是一个聚合全网热门数据的 API 接口服务，覆盖哔哩哔哩、微博、知乎等主流平台。它提供 JSON 和 RSS 两种格式，支持 Docker 及 Vercel 等多种部署方式。该工具极大降低了爬虫维护成本，是构建资讯聚合应用或监控系统的理想后端解决方案。
summary.en: DailyHotApi is a unified API service aggregating trending data from major platforms like Bilibili, Weibo, and Zhihu. It supports JSON and RSS formats with flexible deployment options including Docker and Vercel. Ideal for developers building news aggregators or monitoring systems, it significantly reduces web scraping maintenance costs.

metadata.description: 主要搜集tvbox配置文件

summary.zh: TVBox配置文件收集仓库，整合多种电视盒子播放源配置，支持用户快速部署和切换视频源。适用于家庭影院场景，提供开箱即用的观影体验，简化配置流程，提升使用便捷性。
summary.en: TVBox configuration collection repository, integrating multiple TV box playback source configurations. Supports quick deployment and source switching for home theater scenarios, providing out-of-box viewing experience with simplified setup process.

metadata.name: proxy-scraper
metadata.description: ⭐️ A proxy scraper made using Protractor | Proxy list Updates every three hour 🔥

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个基于 Node.js 和 Protractor 的自动化代理抓取工具。它利用 Selenium 驱动浏览器，每 3 小时自动更新并验证代理列表，支持 HTTP 及 SOCKS 协议。提供 TXT、JSON 等多种格式下载，并可选 MySQL 存储，适用于数据采集与网络隐私保护场景。
summary.en: This repository features an automated proxy scraper built with Node.js and Protractor. Leveraging Selenium for browser automation, it updates and validates proxy lists every 3 hours, supporting HTTP and SOCKS protocols. It offers multi-format downloads (JSON, CSV, etc.) and optional MySQL storage, ideal for data scraping and privacy protection.

metadata.name: breezy-weather
metadata.description: A feature-rich weather app with good visualizations and more than 50 sources.

summary.zh: Breezy Weather 是一款功能丰富的开源 Android 天气应用，支持 50+ 数据源，提供预报、空气质量及花粉监测。基于 Kotlin 与 Jetpack Compose 构建，采用 Material 3 Expressive 设计，具备出色的数据可视化与跨平台兼容性。
summary.en: Breezy Weather is a feature-rich open-source Android app supporting 50+ data sources for forecasts, air quality, and pollen. Built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose using Material 3 Expressive, it offers excellent data visualization and cross-platform compatibility.

metadata.name: lx-music-mobile
metadata.description: 一个基于 React native 开发的音乐软件

summary.zh: LX Music 移动版是一款基于 React Native 开发的开源音乐播放器，支持 Android 5+。核心亮点在于支持自定义音乐源配置，实现灵活的资源获取，并提供私有化数据同步服务以支持多端数据互通。项目采用 Redux 状态管理，注重用户自定义体验与隐私控制。
summary.en: LX Music Mobile is an open-source music player built with React Native, supporting Android 5+. Its key features include customizable music source configuration for flexible resource acquisition and a private data sync service for multi-device synchronization. The project uses Redux for state management, focusing on user customization and privacy control.

summary.zh: 本项目是一个聚合 IPTV 直播源的开源仓库，提供 TXT 和 M3U 格式的订阅链接，支持自动更新。涵盖央视、卫视、港澳台及酒店组播源，兼容安卓电视、Apple TV、Jellyfin 及 Windows 播放器，是构建跨平台家庭流媒体系统的实用工具。
summary.en: This repository aggregates IPTV live streams with TXT and M3U subscription links for automatic updates. It covers CCTV, satellite, and hotel multicast sources, compatible with Android TV, Apple TV, Jellyfin, and Windows players, serving as a practical tool for building cross-platform home streaming systems.

metadata.name: lxmusic-
metadata.description: lxmusic(洛雪音乐)全网最新最全音源

summary.zh: 本项目是洛雪音乐桌面端的第三方音源聚合平台，提供全网最新最全的音乐源接入服务。支持澜音等付费音源配置，包含详细的导入教程与社区交流渠道。旨在为用户提供丰富的听歌体验，同时强调支持正版与合规使用。
summary.en: This repository serves as a third-party audio source aggregator for LX Music desktop clients, providing access to comprehensive music sources. It supports premium source configurations like LanYin, offers installation guides, and maintains community channels. The project aims to enhance user experience while emphasizing support for official content and compliance.

metadata.name: Douyin_TikTok_Download_API
metadata.description: 🚀「Douyin_TikTok_Download_API」是一个开箱即用的高性能异步抖音、快手、TikTok、Bilibili数据爬取工具，支持API调用，在线批量解析及下载。

summary.zh: 这是一个高性能异步的抖音、TikTok、快手和 Bilibili 数据爬取工具。它开箱即用，支持 API 调用、在线批量解析及视频下载。适用于数据采集、内容分析和自动化处理场景，提供稳定的接口服务。
summary.en: A high-performance asynchronous tool for scraping data from Douyin, TikTok, Kuaishou, and Bilibili. It offers out-of-the-box API calls, online batch parsing, and video downloads. Ideal for data collection, content analysis, and automation tasks with stable interface services.

metadata.name: notepad--
metadata.description: 一个支持windows/linux/mac的文本编辑器，目标是做中国人自己的编辑器，来自中国。

summary.zh: Notepad-- 是一款由国人开发的轻量级跨平台文本编辑器，支持 Windows、Linux、Mac 及国产 Uos 系统。项目旨在实现国产软件替代，专注于提升文本编辑体验，具备优秀的系统兼容性，致力于为用户提供安全可靠的国产化工具选择。
summary.en: Notepad-- is a lightweight cross-platform text editor supporting Windows, Linux, Mac, and domestic Uos systems. Aiming for domestic software substitution, it focuses on providing a secure and compatible editing experience for Chinese users, emphasizing independence and technical reliability.

metadata.name: GitHubDesktop2Chinese
metadata.description: GithubDesktop语言本地化(汉化)工具 【GitHub桌面客户端中文汉化】

summary.zh: 这是一个 GitHub Desktop 客户端的自动汉化工具。它基于 C++ 开发，利用正则匹配与 JSON 映射实现文本精准替换。项目具备极高的版本兼容性，维护成本低，支持自动更新及预览版功能，是中文开发者提升版本控制效率的必备辅助工具。
summary.en: This is an automatic localization tool designed specifically for the GitHub Desktop client. Built with C++, it leverages regex matching and JSON mapping to achieve precise text replacement. The project boasts high version compatibility and low maintenance costs, supporting auto-updates and preview features. It is an essential utility for Chinese developers to enhance their version control workflow efficiency and accessibility.

metadata.name: BPB-Worker-Panel
metadata.description: A GUI Panel providing Worker subscriptions for VLESS, Trojan and Warp configs alongside a private DoH server and chain proxies, offering full DNS, clean IP,  Fragment, Warp, Warp pro and routing settings for cross-platform clients using Amnezia, Wireguard, Sing-box, Clash/Mihomo and Xray cores.

summary.zh: BPB Panel 是一个基于 Cloudflare Workers/Pages 的免费 GUI 面板，提供 VLESS、Trojan 和 Warp 配置订阅。它集成了私有 DoH 服务器、链式代理及高级路由规则，支持 Fragment 和 Warp Pro 优化。兼容 Xray、Sing-box、Clash 等主流客户端，实现跨平台安全代理，适合需要绕过网络限制的用户。
summary.en: BPB Panel is a free GUI solution for Cloudflare Workers/Pages, delivering VLESS, Trojan, and Warp subscriptions. It features a private DoH server, chain proxies, and advanced routing with Fragment and Warp Pro support. Compatible with Xray, Sing-box, and Clash cores, it ensures secure, cross-platform connectivity for bypassing network restrictions efficiently.

metadata.name: HelloGitHub
metadata.description: :octocat: 分享 GitHub 上有趣、入门级的开源项目。Share interesting, entry-level open source projects on GitHub.

summary.zh: HelloGitHub 专注分享 GitHub 上有趣、入门级开源项目。通过每月更新的月刊，聚合趣味工具、实战及企业级项目，旨在降低开源参与门槛。项目支持多语言并鼓励社区贡献，是初学者寻找练手项目、爱好者发现新奇技术的理想入口，助力开发者快速入门。
summary.en: HelloGitHub is a platform dedicated to sharing interesting and entry-level open source projects on GitHub. It publishes a monthly newsletter aggregating fun tools, practical projects, and enterprise-level solutions to lower the barrier to open source participation. Supporting multiple languages and community contributions, it serves as an ideal entry point for beginners seeking practice projects and enthusiasts discovering new technologies, helping developers quickly get started.

metadata.name: NetMount
metadata.description: 统一管理和挂载云存储设施/Unified management and mounting of cloud storage facilities

summary.zh: NetMount 是一款基于 Rust 和 Tauri 构建的跨平台云存储管理工具，旨在统一挂载和管理各类云存储设施。项目深度集成 Rclone 与 OpenList 技术，提供高性能、轻量级的桌面端解决方案，支持多平台部署，帮助用户高效整合分散的云端资源，实现本地化访问与管理。
summary.en: NetMount is a cross-platform cloud storage management tool built with Rust and Tauri, designed for unified mounting and management of various cloud storage facilities. Integrating Rclone and OpenList technologies, it offers a high-performance, lightweight desktop solution supporting multi-platform deployment, helping users efficiently consolidate scattered cloud resources for local access and management.

metadata.name: HotPEToolBox
metadata.description: 一个纯净、强大、优雅的WinPE

summary.zh: HotPEToolBox 是一个基于 Python 的 Win11PE 构建工具，旨在打造纯净、强大的系统维护环境。它支持 UEFI/Legacy 启动、NVME 驱动、BitLocker 解锁及 Edgeless 插件扩展。用户可通过脚本轻松生成定制 ISO，适用于系统救援、运维部署及故障排查，提供高度可定制的 PE 体验。
summary.en: HotPEToolBox is a Python-based Win11PE builder for creating pure and powerful system maintenance environments. It supports UEFI/Legacy boot, NVME drivers, BitLocker unlocking, and Edgeless plugin extensions. Users can easily generate custom ISOs via scripts, ideal for system rescue, IT operations, and troubleshooting, offering a highly customizable PE experience.

metadata.name: GoGoGo
metadata.description: 一个基于 Android 调试 API + 百度地图实现的虚拟定位工具，并且同时实现了一个可以自由移动的摇杆

summary.zh: 影梭是一款基于 Android 调试 API 和百度地图 SDK 开发的虚拟定位工具。它无需 ROOT 权限即可修改位置，并提供摇杆模拟移动功能。适用于 Android 8.0+ 系统，支持历史记录与坐标输入。开发者强调仅供学习研究，严禁用于作弊或违规商用，遵循 GPLv3 协议。
summary.en: GoGoGo (YingSuo) is an Android virtual location tool built on Mock Location API and Baidu Map SDK. It allows location spoofing and joystick-controlled movement without root access on Android 8.0+. Designed for learning and testing, it strictly prohibits cheating in sports apps and enforces the GPLv3 license to protect open-source integrity.

metadata.name: Cloudflare-vless-trojan
metadata.description: CF-workers/pages代理脚本：支持Vless-ws(tls)、Trojan-ws(tls)；Socks5/http本地代理脚本：可选ECH-TLS、普通TLS、无TLS三种代理模式

summary.zh: 基于Cloudflare Workers/Pages的代理脚本工具，支持Vless-ws(tls)和Trojan-ws(tls)协议，提供ECH-TLS、普通TLS、无TLS三种代理模式。支持Socks5/Http本地代理，具备自定义域名、优选IP、ProxyIP等配置选项，适用于软路由和本地部署场景。
summary.en: Cloudflare Workers/Pages-based proxy script supporting Vless-ws(tls) and Trojan-ws(tls) protocols with three TLS modes (ECH, standard, none). Features Socks5/Http local proxy, custom domain, preferred IP, and ProxyIP configuration options for soft router and local deployment scenarios.

metadata.name: taosync
metadata.description: TaoSync是一个适用于OpenList v3+的自动化同步工具/Sync for OpenList/AList

summary.zh: TaoSync 是一款专为 OpenList/AList v3+ 设计的自动化同步工具，支持跨平台网盘备份与定时下载。基于 Python 后端与 Vue 前端构建，提供全同步、仅新增等多种模式，支持 Docker 部署及 Cron 定时任务，具备完善的日志监控与通知功能，适合个人及 NAS 用户实现文件自动化管理。
summary.en: TaoSync is an automated synchronization tool designed for OpenList/AList v3+, enabling cross-platform cloud storage backup and scheduled downloads. Built with Python and Vue, it supports Docker deployment, multiple sync modes, and cron-based scheduling. It features robust logging, notifications, and is ideal for personal NAS users seeking automated file management.

metadata.name: cf-proxy-ex
metadata.description: Cloudflare超级代理，无服务器代理，Duckduckgo代理（可用AI聊天，包含GPT4o/Claude3），Github加速，支持解锁Libgen，在线代理。现已支持多平台部署。Cloudflare super proxy, setting up a free serverless proxy by using Cloudflare worker, support Duckduckgo / Libgen. Now you can deploy this project on different platforms.

summary.zh: 基于Cloudflare Worker的无服务器代理解决方案，支持GitHub加速、Duckduckgo AI聊天及Libgen解锁，具备Cookie域管理、表单提交等高级功能。通过多平台部署实现跨设备在线代理，采用安全密码机制保障访问权限，适用于网络加速与受限资源访问场景。
summary.en: Serverless proxy solution built on Cloudflare Worker enabling GitHub acceleration, Duckduckgo AI chat, and Libgen access. Features include cookie domain management, form submission, and multi-platform deployment for cross-device online proxying with password-protected security mechanisms.

metadata.name: NoMoreWalls
metadata.description: 自动抓取合并互联网上的公开节点。

summary.zh: NoMoreWalls 是一款自动聚合全网公开代理节点的工具，利用 GitHub Actions 维护。它提供 Clash Meta 和 Sing-Box 订阅，内置反 996 许可证及病毒拦截规则。通过 jsDelivr 多 CDN 分发，确保节点可用性与安全性，帮助用户规避付费节点风险。
summary.en: NoMoreWalls is a tool that automatically aggregates public proxy nodes from the internet. It uses GitHub Actions for maintenance and provides Clash Meta and Sing-Box subscriptions. With an Anti-996 license and virus blocking rules, it ensures node availability and security via jsDelivr CDN, helping users avoid risks associated with paid nodes.

metadata.name: tvbox
metadata.description: OK影视、tvbox配置文件，如果喜欢，请Fork自用。使用前请仔细阅读仓库说明，一旦使用将被视为你已了解。

summary.zh: 本仓库是 TVBox 生态的聚合配置中心，整合 OK 影视、猫影视及饭太硬等多源接口。支持智能电视、盒子及移动端，兼容多种播放器内核。提供网盘 Token 授权与私有仓库部署方案，实现灵活的资源接入。仅供学习研究，严禁商用。
summary.en: This repository serves as a TVBox configuration aggregator, integrating interfaces from OK影视, CatVod, and other major sources. It supports Smart TVs, boxes, and mobile devices, ensuring compatibility with various player kernels. It provides cloud drive token authorization and private repository deployment for flexible resource access. Strictly for educational purposes; commercial use is prohibited.

metadata.name: iptv-api
metadata.description: ⚡️IPTV直播源自动更新平台『🤖全自动采集、筛选、测速、生成🚀』：自定义获取频道；IPv4/IPv6；接口验效；推流；多平台支持；工作流、Docker、命令行、GUI多端部署 | IPTV live streaming source automatic update platform

summary.zh: IPTV直播源自动更新平台，支持全自动采集、筛选、测速与生成。具备频道自定义、多源聚合、推流及EPG功能，兼容IPv4/IPv6。提供Docker、GUI、命令行及工作流多种部署方式，是构建稳定个人电视直播系统的理想工具。
summary.en: An automated IPTV live streaming source update platform featuring full collection, filtering, speed testing, and generation. It supports custom templates, multi-source aggregation, push streaming, and EPG. Deployable via Docker, CLI, or GUI, it ensures stable streaming with IPv4/IPv6 compatibility, ideal for personal media centers.

metadata.name: httpsok
metadata.description: 🔥🔥🔥一行命令，轻松搞定SSL证书自动续期。 SSL泛域名证书，SSL证书管理，SSL证书自动续期，SSL证书自动更新，七牛云、阿里云、腾讯云、CDN、OSS、https证书管理,https证书管理,免费SSL证书,TLS证书自动续签,nginx证书自动续期工具，nginx证书管理。从此告别Let's Encrypt

summary.zh: httpsok 是一款极简的 SSL 证书自动续期工具，专为 Nginx/Apache 设计。支持一行命令安装，自动识别证书配置，无需手动修改。兼容主流 Linux 及 Docker 环境，提供泛域名管理、证书过期监控及云厂商 CDN 集成。它彻底告别手动续期，确保 HTTPS 服务稳定安全。
summary.en: httpsok is a streamlined SSL certificate auto-renewal tool designed for Nginx and Apache servers. It features one-command installation and automatic configuration detection, eliminating manual edits. Compatible with major Linux distributions and Docker, it supports wildcard domains, expiration monitoring, and CDN integration. This tool simplifies HTTPS management, ensuring secure and stable web services without manual intervention.

metadata.name: Nagram
metadata.description: The third-party Telegram android app.

summary.zh: Nagram 是基于 NekoX 定制的增强型 Telegram Android 客户端。核心价值在于集成多协议代理支持、无限制多账号管理及高级隐私控制。技术亮点涵盖 UI 交互优化、实时翻译及自定义缓存，专为追求高度自定义与网络访问能力的重度用户设计。
summary.en: Nagram is an enhanced Telegram Android client based on NekoX. It features integrated multi-protocol proxy support, unlimited multi-account management, and advanced privacy controls. Key technical highlights include UI/UX optimizations, real-time translation, and customizable caching, designed for power users seeking high customization and network accessibility.

metadata.name: Sandboxie
metadata.description: Sandboxie Plus & Classic

summary.zh: Sandboxie Plus 是一款 Windows 沙箱隔离工具，通过创建安全虚拟环境运行程序，防止对系统注册表及本地磁盘的永久修改。支持无限沙箱隔离、快照管理及便携模式，适用于软件测试、安全浏览及恶意软件分析，提供 Plus 与 Classic 双版本满足不同需求。
summary.en: Sandboxie Plus is a Windows sandbox isolation tool creating secure virtual environments to run apps without modifying the registry or local drives. It supports unlimited sandboxing, snapshot management, and portable mode, ideal for software testing, secure browsing, and malware analysis, offering both Plus and Classic editions.

metadata.name: ecs
metadata.description: VPS 融合怪服务器测评项目 更推荐使用无环境依赖的Go版本 VPS Fusion Monster Server Test Script – More recommended to use the Go version with no environment dependencies: https://github.com/oneclickvirt/ecs

summary.zh: 本项目提供全面的 VPS 服务器性能测评工具，支持多系统架构下的 CPU、磁盘、网络及回程路由测试。核心亮点为无环境依赖的 Go 版本，兼容 Linux/FreeBSD 等主流系统，适用于服务器选购参考与运维自动化诊断。
summary.en: Comprehensive VPS server performance testing tool supporting multi-system architectures for CPU, disk, network, and route tracing. Key feature is the dependency-free Go version, compatible with Linux/FreeBSD, ideal for server selection and automated diagnostics.

metadata.name: awesome-cloudflare
metadata.description: ⛅️ 精选的 Cloudflare 工具、开源项目、指南、博客和其他资源列表。/ ⛅️ A curated list of Cloudflare tools, open source projects, guides, blogs and other resources.

summary.zh: 本仓库是专为独立开发者打造的 Cloudflare 生态资源导航，精选了图床、临时邮箱、网站监控及 Serverless 应用等开源工具。旨在通过利用 Cloudflare Workers 和 R2 等免费服务，帮助开发者显著降低部署成本并提升开发效率，是构建低成本互联网应用的必备指南。
summary.en: A curated resource hub for indie developers leveraging the Cloudflare ecosystem. It aggregates open-source tools for image hosting, temporary emails, monitoring, and Serverless apps. Designed to minimize deployment costs and boost efficiency using Cloudflare Workers and R2, this list is essential for building cost-effective web solutions.

metadata.name: FreeNodes
metadata.description: v2ray、clash免费节点爬虫，自动更新

summary.zh: FreeNodes 是一款基于 AI 技术的自动化爬虫工具，专注于聚合 v2ray 与 Clash 免费节点资源。项目每日定时自动运行，提供多源订阅链接及镜像加速服务，支持多种格式输出，旨在为用户提供稳定、高效的网络节点获取方案。
summary.en: FreeNodes is an AI-powered automated crawler tool dedicated to aggregating free v2ray and Clash nodes. It runs daily on a schedule, offering multi-source subscription links with mirror acceleration and supporting various output formats for stable and efficient node access.

summary.zh: 基于 GitHub Actions 自动化的免费代理节点筛选工具，集成 LiteSpeedTest 测速与 subconverter 订阅转换，支持 SS/Vmess/Trojan/SSR 多协议，提供高速稳定节点订阅链接，适用于网络代理与隐私保护场景。
summary.en: Automated free proxy scraper powered by GitHub Actions, featuring LiteSpeedTest speed evaluation and subconverter subscription transformation. Supports multiple protocols (SS/Vmess/Trojan/SSR) with high-speed stable nodes for network proxy and privacy protection use cases.

metadata.name: X
metadata.description: 如果喜欢，请点亮右上角星星，如有侵权请反馈！谢谢！免责声明：📛本仓库管理者不能保证本仓库内容的合法性、准确性、完整性和有效性，请根据情况自行判断。本仓库内容，仅用于测试和学习研究，禁止用于商业用途，不得将其用于违反国家、地区、组织等的法律法规或相关规定的其他用途，禁止任何公众号、自媒体进行任何形式的转载、发布，请不要在中华人民共和国境内使用本仓库内容，否则后果自负

summary.zh: 本仓库为影视直播源与网络工具聚合平台，整合TVBox配置接口、IPTV链接及影视APP资源。提供CloudFlare搭建指南、在线转换工具及隐私辅助服务。声明仅供技术研究，禁止商用与境内使用，适合开发者探索网络资源获取与部署方案。
summary.en: A comprehensive repository aggregating video streaming sources and network utilities. Features TVBox configurations, IPTV links, and app downloads. Includes CloudFlare deployment guides, online converters, and privacy tools like temporary email. Strictly for research purposes, prohibiting commercial use and domestic deployment within China. Ideal for developers exploring resource acquisition.

metadata.name: GOODBYEADS
metadata.description: 适用于AdGuard、Quantumult X、SmartDNS的去广告规则，合并优质上游规则并去重整理排列。

summary.zh: GOODBYEADS 是专为 AdGuard、Quantumult X 等工具设计的强力去广告规则集合。项目聚合 AdGuard Filters、EasyPrivacy 等优质上游源，经去重整理后提供多格式订阅。拥有超 21 万条拦截规则，支持定时更新与白名单管理，是提升网络隐私与浏览体验的高效工具。
summary.en: GOODBYEADS is a powerful ad-blocking rule collection designed for AdGuard, Quantumult X, and SmartDNS. It aggregates high-quality upstream sources like AdGuard Filters and EasyPrivacy, providing deduplicated and formatted subscriptions. With over 215,000 blocking rules, it supports scheduled updates and whitelists, serving as an efficient tool for enhancing network privacy and browsing experience.

metadata.name: N3RD
metadata.description: CTV

summary.zh: 本项目聚焦Connected TV生态系统，提供跨平台内容分发与实时广告插入解决方案，适用于智能电视及流媒体服务开发。技术亮点包括高效数据处理、用户行为分析及AI驱动的内容推荐，助力开发者快速构建高质量TV应用，提升用户体验与运营效率。
summary.en: This project targets the Connected TV ecosystem, delivering cross-platform content distribution and real-time ad insertion solutions for smart TV and streaming services. Key features include efficient data processing, user behavior analytics, and AI-driven content recommendation, enabling rapid development of high-quality TV applications to enhance user experience and operational efficiency.

metadata.name: adblockfilters
metadata.description: 去广告合并规则，每8个小时更新一次。

summary.zh: 本项目是一个自动化的广告过滤规则聚合工具，通过定时任务每8小时从上游源获取更新，进行合并去重及无效域名清洗。支持AdGuard、DNSMasq等多种格式，提供国内外多组DNS解析验证，旨在为用户提供高效、纯净的网络隐私保护与去广告解决方案。
summary.en: This project is an automated ad-blocking rule aggregator that fetches updates every 8 hours, merging and deduplicating sources while filtering invalid domains via DNS resolution. It supports formats for AdGuard and DNSMasq, offering efficient network privacy protection and ad-blocking solutions for diverse environments.

metadata.name: TikTokDownloader
metadata.description: TikTok 发布/喜欢/合辑/直播/视频/图集/音乐；抖音发布/喜欢/收藏/收藏夹/视频/图集/实况/直播/音乐/合集/评论/账号/搜索/热榜数据采集工具/下载工具

summary.zh: 一款功能强大的开源数据采集与下载工具，支持 TikTok 和抖音的全方位内容获取。涵盖视频、直播、图集、音乐及评论数据的批量下载与持久化存储。提供终端、Web UI 及 API 多种交互模式，支持断点续传、多线程下载及 Docker 部署，是社交媒体数据收集与归档的理想解决方案。
summary.en: A powerful open-source tool for data collection and downloading from TikTok and Douyin. It supports batch downloading of videos, live streams, albums, music, and comments with persistent storage. Featuring terminal, Web UI, and API interaction modes, it offers resume downloads, multi-threading, and Docker deployment, serving as an ideal solution for social media data archiving.

metadata.name: x-ui-yg
metadata.description: x-ui精简修改版脚本，支持最新的Xhttp传输协议、ENC加密、MLDSA65加密，集成argo固定临时双隧道（可共存）、Psiphon赛风VPN（30个国家）分流功能，支持部分节点聚合订阅、sing-box订阅、clash-meta订阅的配置输出

summary.zh: x-ui-yg 是基于原版 x-ui 的精简修改版面板脚本，支持最新 Xhttp 传输、ENC/MLDSA65 加密及 Argo 双隧道技术。集成 Psiphon 赛风 VPN 分流与多协议聚合订阅功能，兼容 Sing-box 与 Clash-meta 配置输出，适用于 VPS 代理搭建与网络隐私保护。
summary.en: x-ui-yg is a streamlined modification of the original x-ui panel, supporting the latest Xhttp transport, ENC/MLDSA65 encryption, and Argo dual-tunnel technology. It integrates Psiphon VPN splitting and multi-protocol aggregation subscriptions, compatible with Sing-box and Clash-meta configurations, ideal for VPS proxy deployment and network privacy protection.

metadata.name: proxypin
metadata.description: Open source free capture HTTP(S) traffic  software ProxyPin, supporting full platform systems

summary.zh: ProxyPin 是一款开源免费的跨平台 HTTP(S) 抓包工具，支持 Windows、Mac、iOS 和 Android。核心功能涵盖扫码连接、流量拦截、JS 脚本处理及请求重写解密。无需复杂配置，适合开发者进行网络调试与流量分析，是高效的网络诊断利器。
summary.en: ProxyPin is an open-source, free HTTP(S) traffic capture tool supporting Windows, Mac, iOS, and Android. It features mobile QR code connection, traffic interception, JS scripting, and request rewriting/decryption. Built with Flutter for a beautiful UI, it simplifies network debugging and traffic analysis across platforms without complex configuration, serving as an efficient network diagnostic utility for developers.

metadata.name: biliup
metadata.description: 自动直播录制、投稿、twitch、ytb频道搬运工具。命令行投稿(B站)和视频下载工具，提供多种登录方式，支持多p。

summary.zh: biliup 是一款基于 Rust 和 Next.js 构建的多平台视频自动化处理工具。它支持 B 站、Twitch 等平台的直播录制、视频下载及命令行投稿，提供可视化 WebUI 界面。具备 24x7 无人值守运行能力，支持多种登录方式，是 UP 主实现内容搬运与自动化运维的高效解决方案。
summary.en: biliup is a cross-platform automation tool built with Rust and Next.js for video management. It supports live streaming recording, downloading, and uploading to Bilibili, Twitch, and YouTube via CLI or WebUI. Designed for 24/7 unattended operation, it features multi-login methods and serves as an efficient solution for content creators and automated workflows.

metadata.name: lx-music-sync-server
metadata.description: 运行在 Node.js 上的 LX Music 数据同步服务

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Node.js 的 LX Music 数据同步服务端，支持将音乐收藏列表同步至私有服务器，实现跨设备管理。项目需配合 Nginx 部署 HTTPS，提供 PM2 进程管理及数据快照恢复功能，适合有服务器运维经验的用户进行私有化部署。
summary.en: This is a Node.js-based sync server for LX Music, enabling private synchronization of music playlists across devices. It supports WebSocket communication and requires Nginx for HTTPS deployment. Features include PM2 process management and snapshot data recovery, ideal for users with server experience seeking self-hosted music data management.

metadata.name: 1Panel
metadata.description: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.

summary.zh: 1Panel 是一款现代开源 VPS 控制面板，主打原生 AI Agent 支持。用户可直接在 Web 界面运行 Ollama 模型、部署 OpenClaw 代理，并管理 Docker 容器及网站。相比传统面板，它提供一键应用市场、自动 SSL 配置及现代化 UI，无需命令行即可高效运维服务器，适合个人开发者及企业使用。
summary.en: 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel featuring native AI agent support. It allows users to run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage Docker containers via a clean web interface. With a one-click app marketplace and automated SSL provisioning, it simplifies server stack management without requiring CLI commands, trusted by over 2 million users globally.

metadata.name: anti-AD
metadata.description: 致力于成为中文区命中率最高的广告过滤列表，实现精确的广告屏蔽和隐私保护。anti-AD 现已支持 AdGuardHome，dnsmasq，Surge，Pi-Hole，Clash, mihomo，smartdns，sing-box 等网络组件。完全兼容常见的广告过滤工具所支持的各种广告过滤列表格式

summary.zh: anti-AD 是中文区命中率最高的广告过滤列表，支持 AdGuardHome、Clash、Surge 等组件。通过域名解析层屏蔽广告与隐私泄露，合并去重并剔除失效域名，提供高命中率规则。完全开源，兼容多种格式，适用于家庭网络及个人设备，有效保护隐私并提升上网体验。
summary.en: anti-AD is the highest hit-rate ad-blocking list for Chinese users, supporting AdGuardHome, Clash, Surge, and more. It blocks ads and privacy leaks at the DNS resolution layer by merging and deduplicating major lists while removing invalid domains. Fully open-source and compatible with various formats, it suits home networks and personal devices, effectively protecting privacy and enhancing browsing experience.

metadata.name: SmartTube
metadata.description: Browse media content with your own rules on Android TV

summary.zh: SmartTube 是一款专为 Android TV 打造的开源媒体客户端，主打无广告体验与高度自定义。支持 8K/HDR 播放、SponsorBlock 集成及无 Google 服务运行，完美适配各类电视盒子，提供纯净、高效的视频浏览与播放方案。
summary.en: SmartTube is an open-source media client for Android TV, focusing on ad-free viewing and high customization. It supports 8K/HDR playback, SponsorBlock integration, and runs without Google Services, offering a clean and efficient video experience for various TV boxes.

metadata.name: downkyi
metadata.description: 哔哩下载姬downkyi，哔哩哔哩网站视频下载工具，支持批量下载，支持8K、HDR、杜比视界，提供工具箱（音视频提取、去水印等）。

summary.zh: 哔哩下载姬是一款专为哔哩哔哩设计的桌面端视频下载工具。核心支持8K、HDR及杜比视界高清画质，具备批量下载能力。内置工具箱提供音视频提取与去水印功能，满足用户本地存档与素材二次创作需求，是B站生态下的高效多媒体处理助手。
summary.en: Downkyi is a desktop video downloader designed for Bilibili, supporting 8K, HDR, and Dolby Vision. It features batch downloading and a toolkit for audio/video extraction and watermark removal. Ideal for local archiving and content creation, it serves as an efficient multimedia tool for the Bilibili ecosystem.

metadata.name: changedetection.io
metadata.description: Best and simplest tool for website change detection, web page monitoring, and website change alerts. Perfect for tracking content changes, price drops, restock alerts, and website defacement monitoring—all for free or enjoy our SaaS plan!

summary.zh: changedetection.io 是一款强大的网站变更监控工具，支持实时检测网页内容变化并发送通知。它集成了AI大模型，能智能过滤无关变更并提供自然语言摘要，大幅降低误报。支持Docker自托管和多种通知渠道，适用于价格追踪、库存监控。
summary.en: changedetection.io is a powerful website change monitoring tool that detects web page updates in real-time and sends alerts. It integrates AI models to intelligently filter irrelevant changes and provide natural language summaries, significantly reducing false positives. Supports Docker self-hosting and multiple notification channels, ideal for price tracking and stock monitoring.

metadata.name: free-api
metadata.description: 收集免费的接口服务,做一个api的搬运工

summary.zh: 本项目是一个持续更新的免费 API 接口聚合平台，旨在为开发者提供低成本、即插即用的数据服务。涵盖生活查询、工具类、AI 大模型调用及娱乐数据等多种场景，通过统一文档格式降低接入门槛，是快速构建原型与补充功能模块的理想资源库。
summary.en: This project is a continuously updated aggregation platform for free APIs, designed to provide developers with low-cost, plug-and-play data services. Covering scenarios like life queries, tools, AI model calls, and entertainment data, it lowers integration barriers with standardized documentation, serving as an ideal resource for rapid prototyping and feature expansion.

metadata.name: rsspush
metadata.description: 监测RSS变动，并发送最新内容到微信、Webhook 和 Telegram, Discord, Slack, Amazon SNS, Gotify 等数十个消息通道。

summary.zh: RSSPush 是一款基于 Docker 部署的 Web 应用，核心功能为实时监测 RSS 源变动，并将最新内容自动推送到微信、Telegram、Discord 等数十种消息通道。支持关键词过滤、自动翻译及 RSSHub 集成，提供灵活的配置选项，是高效的信息聚合与自动化通知工具。
summary.en: RSSPush is a Docker-based web application that monitors RSS feed changes and pushes new content to dozens of channels like WeChat, Telegram, and Discord. Featuring keyword filtering, auto-translation, and RSSHub integration, it offers flexible configuration for efficient information aggregation and automated notifications.

metadata.name: WebMonitor
metadata.description: 实时监控网页变化，并发送通知（Monitor web page changes in real time and send notifications）

summary.zh: WebMonitor 是一款功能强大的网页实时监控工具，支持通过 PhantomJS 抓取异步页面，利用 XPath、CSS 及 JsonPath 精准提取数据。内置邮件、微信、Telegram 等多种通知渠道，提供可视化 UI 界面，适用于运维监控、信息追踪及自动化告警场景。
summary.en: WebMonitor is a robust real-time web page monitoring tool supporting PhantomJS for async content, with XPath, CSS, and JsonPath for precise data extraction. It features multiple notification channels like email, WeChat, and Telegram, plus a visual UI, ideal for ops monitoring and automated alerts.

metadata.name: TrackersListCollection
metadata.description: 🎈 Updated daily! A list of popular BitTorrent Trackers! / 每天更新！全网热门 BT Tracker 列表！

summary.zh: 该项目提供每日自动更新的全网热门 BitTorrent Tracker 列表，旨在显著提升 BT 下载速度与连接稳定性。支持 qBittorrent、Aria2 等多种客户端配置，提供 best/all 等多维度分类及 CDN 加速访问，是 P2P 下载用户的必备工具。
summary.en: This project offers a daily-updated collection of popular BitTorrent Trackers to boost download speeds and connection stability. Supporting clients like qBittorrent and Aria2, it provides categorized lists (best/all) and CDN-accelerated access, serving as an essential tool for P2P download enthusiasts.

metadata.name: FileCentipede
metadata.description: Cross-platform internet upload/download manager for HTTP(S), FTP(S), SSH, magnet-link, BitTorrent, m3u8, ed2k, and online videos.  WebDAV client, FTP client, SSH client.

summary.zh: FileCentipede 是一款跨平台全能文件传输工具，支持 HTTP/FTP/SSH/磁力链及在线视频下载。内置 WebDAV/SSH 客户端与浏览器插件，具备视频嗅探、资源解析及 HTTP 请求等辅助功能，旨在提供高效、定制化的文件管理体验。
summary.en: FileCentipede is a cross-platform all-in-one file transfer manager supporting HTTP, FTP, SSH, BitTorrent, and online video downloads. It features WebDAV/SSH clients, browser extensions for video sniffing, and auxiliary tools like HTTP requesters, ensuring efficient and customizable file management.

metadata.name: Docker_Microsoft365_E5_Renew_X
metadata.description: Docker版本的E5调用API续订服务：Microsoft 365 E5 Renew X

summary.zh: 基于Docker的Microsoft 365 E5自动续订工具，支持多CPU架构部署，提供邮件通知与轻量级镜像（225MB），适用于个人学习及跨平台运维自动化场景。
summary.en: Docker-based tool for automating Microsoft 365 E5 subscription renewals via API. Features multi-architecture support, lightweight 225MB image, email notifications, and cross-platform deployment for personal learning and DevOps automation.

metadata.name: mediago
metadata.description: Cross-platform video downloader — sniff and grab m3u8/HLS streams, Bilibili, YouTube and more. Desktop + Docker + 🦞.

summary.zh: MediaGo 是跨平台视频下载工具，支持桌面与 Docker。内置嗅探，可抓取 m3u8/HLS 流及 YouTube 等千余站点。特色在于集成 AI 助手技能，支持自然语言指令下载，并提供 HTTP API 实现自动化。内置 ffmpeg 转换格式，无需复杂配置，操作便捷。
summary.en: MediaGo is a cross-platform video downloader for desktop and Docker. It features built-in sniffing for m3u8/HLS streams and supports YouTube, Bilibili, and 1000+ sites. Uniquely, it integrates AI assistant skills for natural language downloading and exposes an HTTP API for automation. With built-in ffmpeg conversion, it offers a seamless, extension-free experience.

metadata.name: lx-music-desktop
metadata.description: 一个基于 Electron 的音乐软件

summary.zh: LX Music 是一款基于 Electron 与 Vue 3 构建的跨平台桌面音乐播放器，支持 Windows、macOS 及 Linux。其核心亮点在于提供私有化数据同步服务、开放本地 HTTP API 及 Scheme URL 调用能力，适合高级用户进行深度定制与自动化集成，具备强大的扩展性与跨端协同能力。
summary.en: LX Music is a cross-platform desktop music player built with Electron and Vue 3, supporting Windows, macOS, and Linux. Key features include private data synchronization, an open local HTTP API, and Scheme URL integration. It empowers advanced users with deep customization, automation capabilities, and robust cross-device collaboration for a tailored listening experience.

metadata.name: v2ray-heroku
metadata.description: 用于在 Heroku 上部署 V2Ray WebSocket。

summary.zh: 本仓库提供在Heroku平台一键部署V2Ray WebSocket服务的解决方案，支持自动更新至最新版本。通过绑定域名或CloudFlare Workers优化传输速度，适用于需要稳定代理服务的场景。部署流程简化，强调合理使用以避免资源滥用，同时兼容TLS 1.3提升安全性。
summary.en: This repository enables one-click deployment of V2Ray WebSocket on Heroku with automatic version updates. It supports speed optimization via CloudFlare integration and is designed for stable proxy services. The setup emphasizes responsible usage to prevent resource abuse while ensuring TLS 1.3 compatibility for enhanced security.

metadata.name: ContextMenuManager
metadata.description: 🖱️ 纯粹的Windows右键菜单管理程序

summary.zh: ContextMenuManager 是一款纯粹的 Windows 右键菜单管理工具，支持 Win7 至 Win10 系统。它允许用户精细化启用或禁用各类菜单项，修改名称图标，甚至自定义添加命令。程序兼容高分屏与多语言，通过直接操作注册表清理系统冗余，是提升 Windows 操作效率的必备利器。
summary.en: ContextMenuManager is a pure Windows context menu management tool supporting Win7 to Win10. It enables users to finely control menu items by enabling, disabling, renaming, or customizing them. Compatible with high-DPI and multi-languages, it directly manipulates the registry to remove bloatware, serving as an essential utility for optimizing Windows operation efficiency.

metadata.name: ChromeAppHeroes
metadata.description: 🌈谷粒-Chrome插件英雄榜, 为优秀的Chrome插件写一本中文说明书, 让Chrome插件英雄们造福人类~  ChromePluginHeroes, Write a Chinese manual for the excellent Chrome plugin, let the Chrome plugin heroes benefit the human~ 公众号「0加1」同步更新

summary.zh: 谷粒-Chrome插件英雄榜是一个精选优质Chrome扩展的开源文档库，旨在为开发者与用户编写详尽的中文说明书。项目基于docsify构建，涵盖翻译、去广告、视频下载及AI工具等场景，致力于通过标准化文档推广插件生态，提升浏览器使用效率与体验。
summary.en: ChromeAppHeroes is an open-source documentation repository curating top-tier Chrome extensions. Built with docsify, it provides detailed Chinese manuals covering translation, ad-blocking, video downloading, and AI tools. The project aims to promote the extension ecosystem and enhance browser productivity through standardized documentation.

metadata.name: ShareX
metadata.description: ShareX is a free and open-source application that enables users to capture or record any area of their screen with a single keystroke. It also supports uploading images, text, and various file types to a wide range of destinations.

summary.zh: ShareX 是一款免费开源的屏幕捕捉与文件分享工具。它支持一键截图、录屏及 OCR 识别，并提供强大的图像编辑与多平台上传功能。作为 Windows 平台的高效生产力助手，它通过高度可定制的工作流，极大提升了用户的内容创作与协作效率。
summary.en: ShareX is a free, open-source tool for screen capture and file sharing. It enables one-key screenshots, screen recording, and OCR, featuring robust image editing and multi-platform upload capabilities. As a Windows productivity powerhouse, its highly customizable workflows significantly boost content creation and collaboration efficiency.

metadata.name: v2rayN
metadata.description: A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

summary.zh: v2rayN 是一款跨平台图形化代理客户端，支持 Windows、Linux 及 macOS。它兼容 Xray、sing-box 等多种核心，提供 GPG 签名校验以保障安全。作为网络代理工具，它简化了复杂配置，是用户实现高效、安全网络访问的优选方案。
summary.en: v2rayN is a cross-platform GUI client for Windows, Linux, and macOS, supporting Xray, sing-box, and other cores. It features GPG-signed releases for security and integrity. This tool simplifies complex proxy configurations, offering a reliable solution for secure and efficient network access across diverse operating systems.
